string 2:
I will protect Iliad's peace no matter what—this is neither 
duty nor destiny.
This is my own will, my own vow. The future is something we must grasp with our own hands!

And let the names of those who support me in my oath, 
the Olympos XII...

...be known far and wide! May their names reach worlds
far beyond our own!
That's an Alpha model! Can I hold it for a minute?
Is it really the real thing?
